Variables.Name: Material
Variables.Description: The material to utilize for the emitter at this LOD level.

Variables.Name: ScreenAlignment
Variables.Description:
The screen alignment to utilize for the emitter at this LOD level.
	 	One of the following:
	 	PSA_FacingCameraPosition - Faces the camera position, but is not dependent on the camera rotation.  
	 								This method produces more stable particles under camera rotation.
	 	PSA_Square			- Uniform scale (via SizeX) facing the camera
	 	PSA_Rectangle		- Non-uniform scale (via SizeX and SizeY) facing the camera
	 	PSA_Velocity		- Orient the particle towards both the camera and the direction 
	 						  the particle is moving. Non-uniform scaling is allowed.
	 	PSA_TypeSpecific	- Use the alignment method indicated in the type data module.
	 	PSA_FacingCameraDistanceBlend - Blends between PSA_FacingCameraPosition and PSA_Square over specified distance.

Variables.Name: MinFacingCameraBlendDistance
Variables.Description: The distance at which PSA_FacingCameraDistanceBlend	is fully PSA_Square

Variables.Name: MaxFacingCameraBlendDistance
Variables.Description: The distance at which PSA_FacingCameraDistanceBlend	is fully PSA_FacingCameraPosition

Variables.Name: bUseLocalSpace
Variables.Description: If true, update the emitter in local space

Variables.Name: bKillOnDeactivate
Variables.Description: If true, kill the emitter when the particle system is deactivated

Variables.Name: bKillOnCompleted
Variables.Description: If true, kill the emitter when it completes

Variables.Name: SortMode
Variables.Description:
The sorting mode to use for this emitter.
	 	PSORTMODE_None				- No sorting required.
	 	PSORTMODE_ViewProjDepth		- Sort by view projected depth of the particle.
	 	PSORTMODE_DistanceToView	- Sort by distance of particle to view in world space.
	 	PSORTMODE_Age_OldestFirst	- Sort by age, oldest drawn first.
	 	PSORTMODE_Age_NewestFirst	- Sort by age, newest drawn first.

Variables.Name: bUseLegacyEmitterTime
Variables.Description:
If true, the EmitterTime for the emitter will be calculated by
	 	modulating the SecondsSinceCreation by the EmitterDuration. As
	 	this can lead to issues w looping and variable duration, a new
	 	approach has been implemented. 
	 	If false, this new approach is utilized, and the EmitterTime is
	 	simply incremented by DeltaTime each tick. When the emitter 
	 	loops, it adjusts the EmitterTime by the current EmitterDuration
	 	resulting in proper loopingdelay behavior.

Variables.Name: bRemoveHMDRoll
Variables.Description: If true, removes the HMD view roll (e.g. in VR)

Variables.Name: EmitterDuration
Variables.Description: How long, in seconds, the emitter will run before looping.

Variables.Name: EmitterDurationLow
Variables.Description: The low end of the emitter duration if using a range.

Variables.Name: bEmitterDurationUseRange
Variables.Description:
If true, select the emitter duration from the range 
	 		[EmitterDurationLow..EmitterDuration]

Variables.Name: bDurationRecalcEachLoop
Variables.Description: If true, recalculate the emitter duration on each loop.

Variables.Name: EmitterLoops
Variables.Description:
The number of times to loop the emitter.
	 	0 indicates loop continuously

Variables.Name: SpawnRate
Variables.Description: The rate at which to spawn particles

Variables.Name: ParticleBurstMethod
Variables.Description: The method to utilize when burst-emitting particles

Variables.Name: BurstList
Variables.Description: The array of burst entries.

Variables.Name: EmitterDelay
Variables.Description: Indicates the time (in seconds) that this emitter should be delayed in the particle system.

Variables.Name: EmitterDelayLow
Variables.Description: The low end of the emitter delay if using a range.

Variables.Name: bEmitterDelayUseRange
Variables.Description:
If true, select the emitter delay from the range 
	 		[EmitterDelayLow..EmitterDelay]

Variables.Name: bDelayFirstLoopOnly
Variables.Description: If true, the emitter will be delayed only on the first loop.

Variables.Name: InterpolationMethod
Variables.Description:
The interpolation method to used for the SubUV image selection.
	 	One of the following:
	 	PSUVIM_None			- Do not apply SubUV modules to this emitter. 
	 	PSUVIM_Linear		- Smoothly transition between sub-images in the given order, 
	 						  with no blending between the current and the next
	 	PSUVIM_Linear_Blend	- Smoothly transition between sub-images in the given order, 
	 						  blending between the current and the next 
	 	PSUVIM_Random		- Pick the next image at random, with no blending between 
	 						  the current and the next 
	 	PSUVIM_Random_Blend	- Pick the next image at random, blending between the current 
	 						  and the next

Variables.Name: SubImages_Horizontal
Variables.Description: The number of sub-images horizontally in the texture

Variables.Name: SubImages_Vertical
Variables.Description: The number of sub-images vertically in the texture

Variables.Name: bScaleUV
Variables.Description: Whether to scale the UV or not - ie, the model wasn't setup with sub uvs

Variables.Name: RandomImageTime
Variables.Description:
The amount of time (particle-relative, 0.0 to 1.0) to 'lock' on a random sub image
	 	    0.0 = change every frame
	       1.0 = select a random image at spawn and hold for the life of the particle

Variables.Name: RandomImageChanges
Variables.Description: The number of times to change a random image over the life of the particle.

Variables.Name: bOverrideSystemMacroUV
Variables.Description: Override the system MacroUV settings

Variables.Name: MacroUVPosition
Variables.Description: Local space position that UVs generated with the ParticleMacroUV material node will be centered on.

Variables.Name: MacroUVRadius
Variables.Description: World space radius that UVs generated with the ParticleMacroUV material node will tile based on.

Variables.Name: bUseMaxDrawCount
Variables.Description:
If true, use the MaxDrawCount to limit the number of particles rendered.
	 	NOTE: This does not limit the number spawnedupdated, only what is drawn.

Variables.Name: MaxDrawCount
Variables.Description:
The maximum number of particles to DRAW for this emitter.
	 	If set to 0, it will use whatever number are present.

Variables.Name: UVFlippingMode
Variables.Description: Controls UV Flipping for this emitter.

Variables.Name: CutoutTexture
Variables.Description: Texture to generate bounding geometry from.

Variables.Name: BoundingMode
Variables.Description:
More bounding vertices results in reduced overdraw, but adds more triangle overhead.
	 The eight vertex mode is best used when the SubUV texture has a lot of space to cut out that is not captured by the four vertex version,
	 and when the particles using the texture will be few and large.

Variables.Name: AlphaThreshold
Variables.Description:
Alpha channel values larger than the threshold are considered occupied and will be contained in the bounding geometry.
	 Raising this threshold slightly can reduce overdraw in particles using this animation asset.

Variables.Name: CutoutSubImagesY
Variables.Description: The number of sub-images vertically in the texture

Variables.Name: EmitterNormalsMode
Variables.Description: Normal generation mode for this emitter LOD.

Variables.Name: NormalsSphereCenter
Variables.Description:
When EmitterNormalsMode is ENM_Spherical, particle normals are created to face away from NormalsSphereCenter. 
	  NormalsSphereCenter is in local space.

Variables.Name: NormalsCylinderDirection
Variables.Description:
When EmitterNormalsMode is ENM_Cylindrical, 
	  particle normals are created to face away from the cylinder going through NormalsSphereCenter in the direction NormalsCylinderDirection. 
	  NormalsCylinderDirection is in local space.

Variables.Name: bOrbitModuleAffectsVelocityAlignment
Variables.Description: Ensures that movement generated from the orbit module is applied to velocity-aligned particles

Variables.Name: NamedMaterialOverrides
Variables.Description:
Named material overrides for this emitter. 
		Overrides this emitter's material(s) with those in the correspondingly named slot(s) of the owning system.
